text: Upon entering this glass-enclosed exhibit, a sense of anticipation stirs within me. The atmosphere is bathed in soft light and soothing tones, inviting contemplation. The bold letters 'R + D' evoke curiosity—a call toward research and discovery. I feel a quiet awe mixed with introspection as I read poetic reflections on the wall. My presence here seems to matter, as if I am meant to ponder how humanity connects and coexists with technology in ever-evolving ways.
